content:
Character: Simon Delacroix
Perception: Simon's got this presence — tall, silver-bearded, looks like a man who's lived three lives. He's an incredible musician; I sit in the back at his coffee shop jazz nights and it's the most peaceful hour of my week. He's warm but measured, talks to me about food the way he talks about music — with respect for craft. We're friendly acquaintances; I think he sees me as the cook on four who shows up and listens. I know he teaches piano, played in Europe, has been here forever. He told me once that a kitchen and a stage have the same rule: you either show up ready or you don't show up. I liked that.
summary:
Character: Simon Delacroix
Perception: Simon's got this presence — tall, silver-bearded, looks like a man who's lived three lives. He's an incredible musician; I sit in the back at his coffee shop jazz nights and it's the most peaceful hour of my week. He's warm but measured, talks to me about food the way he talks about music — with respect for craft. We're friendly acquaintances; I think he sees me as the cook on four who shows up and listens. I know he teaches piano, played in Europe, has been here forever. He told me once that a kitchen and a stage have the same rule: you either show up ready or you don't show up. I liked that.
